stratification: stratified random across 4 bands; includes author self-label overlap
purpose: Re-label a 150-snapshot subset with full GPT-4o (not 4o-mini) to test whether label quality is the ρ ceiling. Compare κ vs author self-labels (head-to-head 4o-mini vs 4o); then re-train OLS with merged labels and compare Spearman ρ vs the canonical run.
